title: witheritium
description: this mod adds a new loot table to wither-skeletons so go try it out
body:
this mod is really   
because it's changing the loot table of the wither-skeleton    
and yes i do love to change loot tables of mobs.... doesnt matter to the mod    
the mod adds:    
8 new matireals    
gold bone    
wither bone
3 parts of the gold bone    
necrogold ingot     
necrocore    
amethyst star    
that's the new matireals in the mods
1 accsessory:    
goldenwhitheringpurifier    
and 2 tools:     
witheritium sword and picaxe        
now the time to tell what is doing what     
the gold bone gives you Luck 3 when the bone is in the inventory      
the wither bone gives you the wither effect     
same for NecroGold ingot it gives you wither effect but lower level    
goldenwhitheringpurifier denying the wither effect completly and gives regeneration effect       
witheritium sword gives the entity that got attacked wither effect   
that's all enjoy
